candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; useful as fallback across years.

candidates.row_label: Income resulting from the sales of assets and business operations
candidates.why: Asset/business sale proceeds, not core revenue.
Financial income, not sales revenue.
Investment income, not sales revenue.
FX gain, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Tax based on the taxable income for the period
candidates.why: Tax line, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income line, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to owners, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Contract Assets - Short-Term - Unbilled Revenue in Excess of Advance Consideration & Progress Billings
candidates.why: Related working-capital item, but not the reported revenue line.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Liability/accrual line, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Tax liabilities based on the taxable income for the period
candidates.why: Tax liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Used the primary revenue line and the duplicate total revenue line as fallback priority labels; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Best match for direct operating input costs / cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Cost of integrating the acquired business
candidates.why: Acquisition-related non-core cost, not COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the direct operating cost line most consistent with cost of sales.

candidates.why: Major overhead/personnel cost component above operating result.
Separate above-EBIT development/R&D expense; include in SG&A components when not embedded so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Explicit administrative overhead line, but appears only in some earlier years and may be a subcomponent of broader other expenses.
Relevant overhead type but preview is empty and likely subsumed by employee benefit expenses.
R&D line exists but appears in supplemental section below operating result ordering, so less preferred for SG&A than the above-EBIT development costs line.
Balance sheet asset, not expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not SG&A expense row.
Balance sheet item, not expense.

variables.notes: CR:c||double. R:nc. Candidate list clearly misses the important overhead bucket 'Other expenses' shown above operating result. Selected it from the full preview together with 'Employee benefit expenses'. Included 'Development costs' as separate above-EBIT R&D so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes it. Manual review advised because 'Other expenses' may already contain some admin/R&D subcomponents in some years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other expenses

candidates.why: Dedicated above-EBIT development expense line; best R&D proxy by placement and semantics.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Clearly R&D-related but supplemental amortization line, not preferred over the main above-EBIT expense row.
Explicit R&D label, but appears later in the statement/supplemental section and is below operating result ordering.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet item, not expense.

variables.notes: Prioritized the above-EBIT 'Development costs' row. Included 'Research and Development' as fallback label for years where the company may have reported R&D separately.

candidates.why: Net/total finance cost bucket, but underlying recurring interest components are available and preferred.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses from financial expenses in amortized costs
candidates.why: Primary recurring borrowing interest expense.
Recurring lease interest component; include with other interest expense.
May include recurring finance costs but also potentially non-interest items; excluded to avoid ambiguity.
Semantically ideal but preview empty; less reliable than populated underlying components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Duplicate supplemental version of lease interest; avoid double counting with main line.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses from financial expenses in amortized costs

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest components and excluded FX and total financial expenses to avoid double counting and non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Income statement flow, not balance sheet equity stock.

candidates.row_label: Total profit for the period attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Income statement profit flow, not equity stock.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Best available total equity line; no separate parent/owners equity line is shown.
Potentially includes NCI; use only if no separate equity line exists. Here it equals Total Equity, suggesting no NCI.

variables.notes: No separate 'equity attributable to owners/parent' line is present, so used 'Total Equity'. Because 'Total Equity' equals 'Total Equity & Minority Interest' in all shown years, no separate minority interest appears to exist.

candidates.why: Not a standalone minority interest line; since it equals Total Equity in all shown years, it does not indicate separate NCI.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest / non-controlling interest row is present, and 'Total Equity & Minority Interest' equals 'Total Equity' across the preview, implying MIB is effectively zero.
